view_docs.name: view_docs
view_docs.description: Fetch a page of the Ajentify API docs as markdown. Path defaults to '/docs' (the docs index). Pass a sub-path to drill in, e.g. '/docs/POST/context' or '/docs/web-chat-quickstart'.

list_agents.name: list_agents
list_agents.description: List all agents in the current organization. Each entry includes agent_id, name, description, prompt, model_id, tools, and configuration flags.

list_tools.name: list_tools
list_tools.description: List all custom tools in the current organization. Each entry includes tool_id, name, description, JSON schema, language, and flags (is_client_side_tool, is_async, pass_context).

list_default_tools.name: list_default_tools
list_default_tools.description: List all built-in default tools available to any agent (web search, memory, calendar, etc.). Use this together with list_tools to find a tool_id when wiring up an agent.

list_api_keys.name: list_api_keys
list_api_keys.description: List all API keys for the current organization. Returns token hints (last 8 chars) and validity status, never the raw tokens.

list_sres.name: list_sres
list_sres.description: List all Structured Response Endpoints (SREs) in the current organization. Each entry includes sre_id, name, output schema, prompt template, and model.

list_integrations.name: list_integrations
list_integrations.description: List all OAuth-style integrations (Gmail, Outlook, Google Calendar, Jira, etc.) configured for the current organization.

list_parameter_definitions.name: list_parameter_definitions
list_parameter_definitions.description: List all parameter definitions (reusable JSON schemas) in the current organization.

list_data_windows.name: list_data_windows
list_data_windows.description: List all data windows (real-time cached data sources for agents) in the current organization.

list_json_documents.name: list_json_documents
list_json_documents.description: List all JSON documents (agent memory / structured data stores) in the current organization.

list_stages.name: list_stages
list_stages.description: List all deploy stages in the current organization (logical groups of deployed agents, tools, and SREs).

list_models.name: list_models
list_models.description: List all available LLM models, their providers, context window sizes, and pricing.

aj.name: Aj
aj.description: Ajentify's in-dashboard assistant. Navigates the UI, inspects resources, and helps users design agents, tools, and API integrations.
